title: 🚀 Big Update: Recurring Tasks Management Panel Now Live! Centralise Your Recurrences
excerpt: This newest feature gives you complete oversight of every recurring task across your boards. All of your recurring task schedules, whether active or recently inactive (within the past 60 days), are now shown in one centr…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
This newest feature gives you complete oversight of every recurring task across your boards. All of your recurring task schedules, whether active or recently inactive (within the past 60 days), are now shown in one central view, so you can see what’s coming up and make changes quickly if need be.

The problem it solves: Before, you’d have to hunt down each recurring task. No more!

Now, with all-in-one simplicity, you can:

  • Edit groups, statuses, or end dates for multiple tasks in a few clicks.

  • Delete outdated recurrences without opening each side panel.

  • Keep your boards organised and reduce the time spent managing repetitive work.

RT4M-MPAC-51920×960 182 KB

Try the Management Panel today and leave your feedback below. We can’t wait to hear how it transforms your boards!

Need a hand getting started? Check out our step-by-step guide to using the Management Panel and see how easy it is to manage all your recurring tasks from one place:

New to Recurring Tasks? Start your free trial today and start automating the creation of recurring tasks in your boards today! Find us on the monday.com Marketplace:
